commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

commit.message:
fix: only install Entire hook when Entire is enabled in the repo

register_claude_hook() checked `command -v entire` (global install)
instead of verifying Entire is actually enabled in the current repo.
This caused the Entire session-start hook to be installed in every
repo where fill-gaps ran, even when Entire wasn't in use.

Now checks `entire status` output for "not set up" before installing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use bluetoothctl subprocess for BLE pairing instead of BleakClient.pair()

BleakClient.pair() fails with AuthenticationFailed because no BlueZ
agent is registered. bluetoothctl has a built-in agent that handles
authentication automatically. The new implementation:
- Checks if already paired first
- Removes stale bonding info before pairing
- Pairs and trusts the device via bluetoothctl
- Verifies pairing status after completion

Bump version 0.4.5 → 0.4.6.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

  to prevent drift between Shadow DOM and fallback styles

Add Board Notes and Board Requests features

- /board/notes: Board submits strategic direction hints via web form.
  Notes are stored as markdown in state/board-notes/ and included in
  all orchestrator prompts. Marked as acknowledged after each cycle.
- /board/requests: Inheritance can write requests for things it needs
  (libraries, deps, access). Board can mark them fulfilled with an
  optional response via the web UI.
- Orchestrator integration: board notes injected into all task prompts,
  auto-acknowledged after cycle completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix upload silence and dashboard timeout

Upload silence (no WhatsApp response after document uploads):
- Add semaphore to limit concurrent background extractions to 3
  (prevents DB connection pool exhaustion from many simultaneous GPT calls)
- Reduce pool_size to 5+10 overflow (was 10+20) to match Supabase limits

Dashboard timeout:
- Compute health score inline during preventive records query
  (eliminates duplicate DB query from health_score.py)
- Make dashboard GET endpoint async to avoid blocking event loop
- Add indexes on pet_id (documents, preventive_records) and
  preventive_record_id (reminders) for faster joins
- Increase frontend timeout from 15s to 30s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v10.1.2127: TS-ARCH-CREATION-ACTIONS-RESOLUTION-GUARD-V3.1-01 — Skip entity resolution for creation actions

Creation actions (add_field, add_material, add_machine, etc.) create new
entities that do not yet exist. The resolver was incorrectly attempting to
resolve these names against existing records, triggering NOT_FOUND →
_multi_field_resolution_failed → CLARIFY → TECHNICAL_ERROR.

Fix:
- New global constant: modules/constants/action_types.py → CREATION_ACTIONS
- Pipeline entry: skip singular→array promotion for creation actions
- Resolver: early exit (no LLM calls) for creation actions
- Clarification gate: skip multi-entity CLARIFY for creation actions
- Validation gate: skip multi-resolution failure short-circuit for creation
- Trace flag: resolution_skipped_for_creation=true for observability

Fixes: "upiši mi novu njivu, Prva njiva" → TECHNICAL_ERROR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add input PM assessment v3: final release evaluation with three-version comparison

Evaluates v2->v3 progress (0/5 planned items completed), three-version
code complexity trend, competitive gap analysis, test coverage (47/47
pass), and release readiness verdict (conditionally publishable with
2 remaining High issues: listener leak + soft backspace delay).

commit.message:
feat: redesign Claude Decisions box for at-a-glance clarity

New layout order (top to bottom):
1. Header: ACTION  ████████ 82%  [bypass/blocked tags]  ↳ trigger
2. Executed — immediately visible, color-coded ✓/~/✗/⚠ per trade status
3. Rationale — word-wrapped, dimmed
4. Proposed — compact table (symbol/type/amount), reasons below in grey
5. Flags — deduplicated, BLOCKED/HALT in red, others in yellow, truncated
6. Recent — last 8 decisions with time/action/confidence/trigger

Changes: execution moved to top, trade reasons separated from trade table,
risk flags deduplicated and filtered (no repeated BLOCKED buy spam),
history expanded to 8 entries, boot render matches new format.

Fix: contractor_entity_type enum value 'company' -> 'legal_entity'

The contractors table uses an enum with values {individual, legal_entity}
but the code was passing 'company' which silently failed all inserts.
This is why the contractors table had 0 rows and client_id was always null.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(pos): ISSUE-051/066 — fix saleItemsSnapshot race cancelling createSale

Root cause: saleItemsSnapshot initialized as null, then set via useEffect
on first render. This caused saleItems reference to change (null→snapshot),
triggering createSale useEffect cleanup (cancelled=true) while the async
getStockBatch call was in-flight. The finally() skipped setLoadingSale(false)
when cancelled, leaving loadingSale stuck at true permanently. The next
useEffect run hit the loadingSale guard and returned early — createSale
was never called, saleId stayed null, Complete Payment stayed disabled.

Fix: lazy-init saleItemsSnapshot synchronously from computedSaleItems so
no state change fires on first render and the createSale effect runs
uninterrupted.

fix: Add Tier 0 (folder thinkers) + fix hyphenated name matching in Profile Authors

Tier 0: Match abbreviated names against folder's own thinkers (e.g.,
"F Rapp" → "Friedrich Rapp" if Friedrich Rapp is in the folder). Runs
before Scholar profiles, OpenAlex, and Google Search tiers.

Fix _abbreviation_matches(): Handles hyphenated names ("Peter-Paul" →
"PP"), surname prefixes ("de", "van", "von"), and middle initials.
Now used by both OpenAlex matching (checks up to 10 authors instead
of 3) and Tier 0 folder thinker matching.

Test cases verified: PP Verbeek, F Rapp, MA Wood, GJ Lokhorst,
MT Bosschaert, DP Ferreira, MJ Verkerk, CP Gonzalez.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix canViewTicket: CX subDepartment is a list filter, not an access barrier

Before: A CX user with subDepartment="Customer Support" could not access
any ticket that had a vendorHandle, even if she needed to work on it.
This caused 403 on PATCH for Sadia and any CX agent with a subDepartment.

After: All CX users (any subDepartment) can VIEW and UPDATE any ticket
in the CX department. subDepartment still filters the default list view
(filterTicketsByDepartmentAccess) so agents see their relevant tickets
first — but it is no longer an access barrier on individual ticket ops.

[UPGRADE] Skills Factory v3.0 - Automated eval loops, agents, and orchestration

Major upgrade adding automated evaluation infrastructure inspired by Anthropic's
skill-creator patterns, adapted for Windows with schema-enforced data interchange.

New components:
- Automated eval loop (run_eval, run_loop, improve_description, generate_report)
- Agent-based grading (grader, comparator, analyzer)
- Benchmark aggregation with statistical summaries
- Description optimization with train/test split
- Interactive eval tools (eval_review.html, eval-viewer)
- Schema reference (SCHEMAS.md) with 10 JSON schemas
- Self-evaluation evals (evals.json + trigger-eval.json)

SKILL.md restructured with orchestration contract:
- State detection, workspace convention, subagent prompt templates
- Parallelism rules, loop termination criteria, anti-pattern blocks
- Asset registry with inline pointers to step usage
